positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement. The central subject is an ornate, stylized moon flower cradled by swirling cosmic vines and deep-sea coral structures. The composition must be perfectly centered and contain clean, strong silhouettes suitable for single-color printing on apparel. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, vibrant teal, aged gold, and stark ivory white. Emphasize high contrast and clean linework. The overall style is neo-mystic illustrative, resembling etched ink drawings mixed with mandalas, rendered with hyper-sharp details, maximalism, symmetry, high saturation, graphic novel aesthetics, vector art quality, studio lighting, designed for screen printing.
